description: Demo/eval principal-mapping fixture (Plan_Review P1.1). Upserted into principal_mappings by `npm run db:seed`. Maps source-native principals stored on chunks to the Entra principals callers actually hold. A source principal with NO row here is invisible to everyone — that is the fail-closed default, demonstrated by confluence-group:board-secret which is deliberately unmapped.

mappings.note: demo: HR payroll team may read salary bands
